description_long: This forklift features a compact, industrial design with a white and red body, black overhead guard, and two long, robust fork arms extending from the front. The operator is seated in an open cab, protected by a sturdy overhead guard, and is dressed in green workwear with a yellow helmet. The mast is tall and rectangular, with visible lift chains and a black finish, supporting the fork arms for vertical movement. The vehicle has four black wheels, with the rear wheels slightly smaller and the front wheels positioned under the mast for stability. The side panels display markings and text, adding to its realistic, utilitarian appearance. The overall construction is predominantly metal, with some plastic and rubber components, and the surfaces show signs of wear and use.
description: A compact, industrial forklift with a white and red body, black mast and overhead guard, and a seated operator in green workwear. The vehicle features long fork arms, visible lift chains, and realistic surface wear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the two long fork arms, the mast, and the operator seated behind the controls, with the overhead guard visible above.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the operator in green, the detailed cab area, the full length of the fork arms, and the side markings on the body.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the forklift, the operator's seat, the overhead guard, and the rear wheels.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the operator, the mast, fork arms, and additional side details.
attribute_fork_arms: The forklift has two parallel, straight fork arms made of metal, each extending forward from the mast. They are long, flat, and rectangular in shape, with a moderate thickness and slightly worn surfaces. The arms are positioned close together and are designed to slide under pallets or loads.
attribute_overhead_guard: The overhead guard is a rectangular, black metal frame with a grated top, providing full coverage above the operator's seat. It is supported by four vertical posts and offers protection from falling objects, with a robust and industrial appearance.
attribute_mast: The mast is a tall, double-stage structure with a black finish, featuring visible lift chains and guide rails. It is rectangular in cross-section and supports the vertical movement of the fork arms, with clear signs of industrial use.
attribute_operator_seat: The operator seat is a single, contoured chair with a backrest, upholstered in dark material. It is sized for one adult, with no visible armrests or headrest, and is positioned centrally within the cab area.
attribute_warning_lights: No visible warning lights are present on the forklift in any of the provided views.
